voteDescription: BAH GAWD! **{initiator}** has called out **{target}** for a STEEL CAGE MUTE MATCH! THE CROWD GOES WILD!
votePassedDescription: BY GOD, **{target}** HAS BEEN ELIMINATED! They've been SLAMMED into **{duration} minutes** of silence! SOMEBODY STOP THE DAMN MATCH!
voteExpiredDescription: The match against **{target}** has been declared a NO CONTEST! Only {votes}/{needed} fans showed up! WHAT A DISAPPOINTMENT!
userMutedDescription: **{target}** is DOWN! DOWN FOR THE COUNT! **{duration} minutes** on the mat! THE REFEREE HAS MADE THE CALL!
dmDescription: THE CROWD IN **{server}** HAS SPOKEN! You've been pinned for a **{duration}-minute** count! YOUR CHAMPIONSHIP REIGN OF TALKING IS OVER!
dmVotersLabel: The Tag Team That Took You Down
dmTip: WANT A REMATCH? Boost the server for 1 HOUR of INVINCIBILITY! THAT'S RIGHT, UNLIMITED POWER!
unauthorizedUnmuteDescription: WAIT A MINUTE! **{executor}** JUST RAN IN FROM BACKSTAGE AND TRIED TO SAVE **{target}**! THAT'S ILLEGAL! SECURITY!
selfMuteReactions: BAH GAWD! THEY HIT THEMSELVES WITH THEIR OWN CHAIR!
WHAT IS HAPPENING?! THE WRESTLER IS PINNING THEMSELVES!
IN 30 YEARS OF CALLING MATCHES I HAVE NEVER SEEN SOMEONE SUPLEX THEMSELVES!
THEY'VE TAPPED OUT BEFORE THE MATCH EVEN STARTED! UNPRECEDENTED!
THE CROWD IS STUNNED! A SELF-ELIMINATION! THIS IS UNHEARD OF IN THE HISTORY OF OUR SPORT!
footerText: CAST YOUR VOTE! LET'S GET READY TO RUMBLEEEE!
